---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or view for the web UI
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen. A page, a widget, an interaction on an existing view?

**Data shape**
What data does this need? Is any of it already served by an existing `/v1/*`
endpoint (see `AGENTS.md`), or does it require new server-side work?

**Use case**
Who is this for and what task does it help them finish?

**Mockups / references**
Optional — sketches, screenshots, or links to similar UIs.
